# ProteinGPT

> AI-powered protein powder shopping assistant for the Indian market. Compares 124+ whey, plant-based, casein, and mass-gainer products across Amazon, Flipkart, Nutrabay, HealthKart and MuscleBlaze on price, protein content, certifications and value score.

ProteinGPT helps fitness enthusiasts in India pick the right protein powder for their goal (muscle building, cutting, bulking, general fitness), budget, diet (vegan/vegetarian/dairy-free) and experience level. It uses retrieval-augmented generation over a curated product knowledge base and ranks results by an objective value score that combines price per gram of protein, third-party lab certifications, and user ratings.

## Pages
- [Home](/): App entry — redirects into a new chat session.
- [Sign in](/auth): Create an account or sign in to save chat history and personalised recommendations.

## Optional
- [Chat](/chat): Conversational interface for protein recommendations and product comparisons (requires sign-in).
